cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So, there are five team members: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a starting position in a soccer match. The question is about tracking their position swaps and figuring out where Eve ends up. The answer options are given, so I need to track each swap step by step. First, I need to list out the initial positions: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, there are several swaps happening in sequence. Let me break them down one by one. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So after this swap, Dave is now goalkeeper, and Eve is now left winger. Let me note that down: After first swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. So Claire, who was right midfielder, now becomes center midfielder, and Bob, who was center midfielder, becomes right midfielder. After second swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice was fullback, Bob is right midfielder. After swapping: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions. Previously, Eve was left winger and Dave was goalkeeper. Now: - Eve: goalkeeper - Dave: left winger So now, after fourth swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Wait, but the fourth swap says Eve and Dave trade positions again. Wait, the first swap was Dave and Eve, then later they swap again? So after the fourth swap, they are back to their original positions? Let me check: First swap: Dave (left winger) and Eve (goalkeeper) switch. So Dave is goalkeeper, Eve is left winger. Fourth swap: Eve and Dave switch again. So Eve, who is left winger, goes back to goalkeeper, and Dave, who is goalkeeper, goes back to left winger. Yes, so after the fourth swap, Dave is back to left winger, Eve back to goalkeeper. But let me make sure I didn't miss any steps. Then fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. Let me check again. After third swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Then fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade. So: - Eve becomes goalkeeper - Dave becomes left winger So after fourth swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger
